description: Fix 22 failing E2E tests across AMM and credential commands — enable DefaultRipple on issuer, increase LastLedgerSequence offset, add friendly error handling, fix WebSocket disconnection

userStories.title: Enable DefaultRipple on issuer in AMM test helpers
userStories.description: As a developer running AMM tests, I need the test helper to set DefaultRipple on the issuer account so that AMM transactions don't fail with terNO_RIPPLE.
acceptanceCriteria: Each AMM test file's setupPool() function calls AccountSet with SetFlag: 8 (asfDefaultRipple) on the issuer account BEFORE creating the trust line
The AccountSet transaction is submitted via client.submitAndWait() and the result asserts tesSUCCESS
Files to modify: tests/e2e/amm/amm.create-info.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.bid-vote.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.delete.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.deposit-withdraw.test.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Increase LastLedgerSequence offset in AMM test setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the setupPool() helper's client.autofill() calls to use a larger LastLedgerSequence offset so the TrustSet and Payment transactions in test setup don't expire under concurrent load.
acceptanceCriteria: In each AMM test file's setupPool(), after client.autofill(), override LastLedgerSequence on the filled tx object by adding 80 to the autofilled value (e.g. filled.LastLedgerSequence = (filled.LastLedgerSequence ?? 0) + 80)
Apply the override to both the TrustSet autofill and the Payment autofill inside setupPool()
Files to modify: tests/e2e/amm/amm.create-info.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.bid-vote.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.delete.test.ts, tests/e2e/amm/amm.deposit-withdraw.test.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Increase LastLedgerSequence offset in AMM CLI command
userStories.description: As a CLI user submitting AMM transactions, I need a larger LastLedgerSequence offset so transactions don't expire on slow networks.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/commands/amm.ts, after each client.autofill(baseTx) call, add: filled.LastLedgerSequence = (filled.LastLedgerSequence ?? 0) + 80
Apply this to ALL AMM transaction types: AMMCreate, AMMDeposit, AMMWithdraw, AMMBid, AMMVote, AMMDelete, AMMClawback
The offset increase applies to both submitAndWait and submit (no-wait) code paths
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add friendly error handling for LastLedgerSequence expiry in AMM command
userStories.description: As a CLI user, when my AMM transaction expires, I want a clear error message instead of a raw stack trace.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/commands/amm.ts, wrap each client.submitAndWait() call in a try/catch block
The catch block detects errors where err.constructor.name === 'TimeoutError' OR err.message includes 'LastLedgerSequence'
On match, write 'Error: transaction expired (LastLedgerSequence exceeded)\n' to stderr and call process.exit(1)
Pattern must match the existing implementation in src/commands/credential.ts lines 236-245
Apply to all 7 AMM subcommand handlers: create, deposit, withdraw, bid, vote, delete, clawback
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix WebSocket DisconnectedError in credential tests
userStories.description: As a developer running credential tests, I need the 3 failing credential delete tests to not fail with DisconnectedError: WebSocket is not open.
acceptanceCriteria: In tests/e2e/credential/credential.network.test.ts, add a reconnection guard: before operations that use the shared client, check if client.isConnected() is false and reconnect if needed
Alternatively, wrap credential delete test setup operations with resilientSubmitAndWait from tests/e2e/helpers/fund.ts
The 3 credential delete tests (--dry-run, --credential-type-hex, --no-wait) that failed with DisconnectedError now pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify all 22 previously-failing tests pass
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to confirm the fixes resolve all failures with no regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npx vitest run tests/e2e/amm/ tests/e2e/credential/credential.network.test.ts
All 22 previously-failing tests pass
No regressions in other test files
Typecheck passes
